draws.title: Two of Cups
draws.message: Two paths are asking for your attention. Choose with your whole self, not only your fear. In the realm of cups, your water medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: respond with emotional honesty and care.

draws.title: Temperance
draws.message: Healing may arrive through small adjustments, not dramatic extremes.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: blend patience with action.

draws.title: Three of Swords
draws.message: Something is beginning to take shape through collaboration, practice, or patience. In the realm of swords, your air medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: speak clearly without using truth as a weapon.

draws.title: Ace of Wands
draws.message: A new beginning is glowing. Protect the spark before demanding the harvest. In the realm of wands, your fire medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: move one spark from idea into action.

draws.title: Four of Cups
draws.message: Stability is asking to be tended. What supports you deserves care too. In the realm of cups, your water medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: respond with emotional honesty and care.

draws.title: The World
draws.message: You have crossed more thresholds than you remember.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: celebrate one cycle you survived or completed.

draws.title: The High Priestess
draws.message: The quiet answer may be the truest one.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: make space for your inner voice.

draws.title: Three of Pentacles
draws.message: Something is beginning to take shape through collaboration, practice, or patience. In the realm of pentacles, your earth medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: care for the practical thing right in front of you.

draws.title: Four of Wands
draws.message: Stability is asking to be tended. What supports you deserves care too. In the realm of wands, your fire medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: move one spark from idea into action.

draws.title: Six of Swords
draws.message: Support, memory, and restoration are available. Let care move both ways. In the realm of swords, your air medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: speak clearly without using truth as a weapon.

draws.title: Seven of Wands
draws.message: Not every option deserves your energy. Choose what is aligned, not merely loud. In the realm of wands, your fire medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: move one spark from idea into action.

draws.title: King of Pentacles
draws.message: Power is most sacred when it protects, steadies, and serves. In the realm of pentacles, your earth medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: care for the practical thing right in front of you.

draws.title: The Star
draws.message: Hope returns like starlight: quiet, distant, and still real.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: offer hope without denying pain.

draws.title: The Sun
draws.message: Joy is medicine, not a distraction from the work.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: let one honest delight take up space.

draws.title: Eight of Pentacles
draws.message: Progress is happening. Stay present with the rhythm instead of rushing the result. In the realm of pentacles, your earth medicine is asking to be honored.

draws.title: The Devil
draws.message: Naming the pattern is the beginning of loosening it.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: notice what drains your freedom.
